choices: A new user account named ll
A short name that expands to a long listing command
items.explain: An alias is a text shortcut for a command string in the current shell.

items.prompt: When you need arguments like $1 or "$@", prefer…
items.explain: Functions (and scripts) take arguments cleanly; aliases are poor at that.

items.prompt: unalias ll removes the ll alias from the current session.
items.explain: unalias drops a session alias; startup-file aliases return in a new shell.

items.prompt: type greet after defining greet() { … } typically shows it is a…
items.explain: type reports whether a name is an alias, function, or external command.
